toeic.question_en: The board of directors will ___ the proposed merger at the next quarterly meeting.
toeic.explanation_zh: 情態動詞 will 之後必須接動詞原形，故選 (A) review。(B) reviews 是第三人稱單數現在式，(C) reviewing 為現在分詞或動名詞，(D) reviewed 是過去式或過去分詞，皆不能直接接在 will 之後。

toeic.question_en: All employees must submit their travel expense reports ___ Friday afternoon.
toeic.explanation_zh: by 表示「在某時間點之前完成」一次性動作，符合「在週五下午前繳交」之意。until 表示動作持續到某時間點為止，與「繳交」這一次性行為不符；since 用於完成式表示起點；from 表示起點，皆不適合。

toeic.question_en: The marketing team is currently ___ a new advertising campaign for the upcoming product launch.
toeic.explanation_zh: is 後面接現在分詞構成現在進行式，故選 (C) developing。其他選項無法與 is 構成正確時態。

toeic.question_en: The new accounting software has significantly improved our ___ in processing invoices.
toeic.explanation_zh: 所有格 our 之後須接名詞，且此處指抽象的「效率」概念，用不可數名詞 efficiency。(A) 是形容詞，(B) 是副詞，(D) 是複數形，語意上不適合此單一概念。

toeic.question_en: Mr. Tanaka, ___ has been with the company for over twenty years, will retire next month.
toeic.explanation_zh: 先行詞為人 (Mr. Tanaka) 且關代在子句中當主詞，故用主格 who。which 用於事物；whose 為所有格；whom 為受格，皆不正確。

toeic.question_en: If the shipment ___ on time, we would have met the client's deadline.
toeic.explanation_zh: 與過去事實相反的假設，主句為 would have met（過去完成式條件句），從句須用 had + 過去分詞，故選 (C) had arrived。

toeic.question_en: The CEO requested that every department head ___ a monthly performance report.
toeic.explanation_zh: request that 後面接虛擬語氣，動詞用原形，不論主詞為何皆使用 submit。其他類似動詞還有 suggest, recommend, demand, insist 等。

toeic.question_en: Our quarterly profits have increased ___ 15 percent compared to the same period last year.
toeic.explanation_zh: increase by + 數字 表示「增加的幅度」，故選 (A) by。increase to 表「增加到某數字」，搭配的是結果值；at 與 on 與此語境不搭。

toeic.question_en: ___ the heavy rain, the outdoor product demonstration was postponed until next week.
toeic.explanation_zh: 空格後是名詞片語 the heavy rain，需用介系詞片語 due to（因為）。(A) Although 與 (B) Because 為連接詞，後面須接子句；(D) Despite 雖為介系詞但語意（儘管）與「延期」不符。

toeic.question_en: The new training program is designed to help employees ___ their communication skills.
toeic.explanation_zh: help + 受詞 + (to) 原形動詞，help 後可省略 to 直接接原形，故 (A) enhance 最佳。雖然 (B) to enhance 也可以，但在 TOEIC 慣用 help 後直接接原形動詞作為標準答案。

toeic.question_en: Please contact the HR department ___ you have any questions regarding the new benefits package.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「如果有任何問題就聯絡 HR」屬於條件句，用連接詞 if。so that 表目的；in order to 後接原形動詞；despite 為介系詞，皆不符。

toeic.question_en: The conference room ___ for the board meeting at 3 p.m. tomorrow.
toeic.explanation_zh: 會議室是「被預訂」，需用被動語態。已完成的動作用現在完成被動 has been reserved。其他選項皆為主動語態，不符語意。

toeic.question_en: There are ___ applicants for the senior analyst position than we expected.
toeic.explanation_zh: 句中有 than，表示比較級，故用 more。many 為原級；much 修飾不可數名詞；most 為最高級，皆不符。

toeic.question_en: The financial report should be reviewed ___ before being submitted to the auditors.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾動詞 reviewed 須用副詞 carefully。(A) 是形容詞，(C) 是名詞，(D) 是現在分詞，皆不符語法。

toeic.question_en: Ms. Lee asked her assistant to prepare the presentation materials ___.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「她自己的（簡報資料）」用所有格代名詞 hers，等於 her presentation materials。但此處語意為「替她準備」，重新檢視：實際上 prepare materials for her 較常見，但若選 herself 則表示親自做。最合理為 (B) her，但 her 為受格不能單獨置於句尾。重審：這裡應理解為「準備她（自己）的簡報資料」，所有格代名詞 hers 替代 her materials。

toeic.question_en: The company has been expanding its overseas operations ___ 2010.
toeic.explanation_zh: 現在完成進行式搭配時間點（2010）用 since（自從）。for 後接時間長度；from 通常與 to 搭配；in 表「在某年」但不能搭配完成式表起點。

toeic.question_en: The supervisor was very ___ with the team's performance during the project.
toeic.explanation_zh: 主詞是人 (supervisor) 「感到」印象深刻，用過去分詞 impressed。impressing 用於令人印象深刻的事物本身。

toeic.question_en: Neither the manager ___ his subordinates were aware of the policy change.
toeic.explanation_zh: neither...nor... 為固定搭配，意為「兩者皆不」。其他連接詞無法與 neither 搭配。

toeic.question_en: The keynote speaker emphasized the importance of ___ to changing market trends.
toeic.explanation_zh: 介系詞 of 後須接動名詞，故選 (B) adapting。to adapt 為不定詞，不能接在介系詞之後。

toeic.question_en: We had the broken photocopier ___ by a technician yesterday afternoon.
toeic.explanation_zh: have + 物 + 過去分詞 為使役用法，表「請別人做某事」。物（photocopier）與 repair 為被動關係，故用過去分詞 repaired。

toeic.question_en: The shareholders meeting will be held in the main auditorium ___ April 15th.
toeic.explanation_zh: 特定日期前用介系詞 on（April 15th）。in 用於月份、年份；at 用於時刻；by 表「在...之前」。

toeic.question_en: Despite the economic downturn, our company managed to ___ a steady growth rate.
toeic.explanation_zh: managed to + 原形動詞，表「設法做到」，故選原形 (A) maintain。

toeic.question_en: The new policy applies to ___ employees who joined the company after January 1st.
toeic.explanation_zh: 後面接複數名詞 employees，用 all。every 與 each 後接單數名詞；much 修飾不可數名詞。

toeic.question_en: Customers who place an order before 3 p.m. will receive their items ___ two business days.
toeic.explanation_zh: within + 時間 表「在...時間內」，符合「兩個工作天內收到」之意。among 用於三者以上之間；between 用於兩者之間（指位置）；along 表沿著。

toeic.question_en: The proposal was approved ___ the unanimous support of the executive committee.
toeic.explanation_zh: thanks to 表「多虧、由於」，符合「因執行委員會一致支持而獲批准」之意。其他片語語意皆不符。

toeic.question_en: Mr. Robinson is the most ___ candidate for the position of regional director.
toeic.explanation_zh: the most + 形容詞 為最高級結構。qualified 是形容詞「有資格的」，修飾人。qualifying 為現在分詞，較少用；qualification 為名詞。

toeic.question_en: Please ensure that all confidential documents ___ in the secure cabinet after use.
toeic.explanation_zh: documents 是「被放置」，須用被動語態 are placed。其他選項為主動或非謂語形式，皆不符。

toeic.question_en: The technical support team will respond to your inquiry ___ 24 hours.
toeic.explanation_zh: within 24 hours 表「24小時內」。for 表持續時間；during 後接特定時段名詞；until 表「直到」。

toeic.question_en: Our sales figures this quarter are ___ higher than those of the previous quarter.
toeic.explanation_zh: much 用以加強比較級 higher。very, too, so 不可直接修飾比較級。其他可用詞還有 even, far, a lot。

toeic.question_en: The new branch office in Singapore ___ next month, according to the press release.
toeic.explanation_zh: next month 為未來時間，用未來式 will open。雖然進行式表近期計畫也可，但本句強調根據新聞稿的未來事件，用 will 最直接。實際上 (B) is opening 也常見於既定計畫，但搭配 according to the press release 此處 will 較標準。

toeic.question_en: All staff members are required ___ the safety training session before the end of the month.
toeic.explanation_zh: be required to + 原形動詞 為固定搭配，表「被要求做某事」。

toeic.question_en: The CEO announced that the company would be ___ its workforce by 10 percent next year.
toeic.explanation_zh: would be + 現在分詞 構成過去式的未來進行式，故選 reducing。如選 reduced 則為被動，但後面有受詞 its workforce，不符。

toeic.question_en: Our company offers a ___ range of financial services to corporate clients.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾名詞 range 須用形容詞 wide。widely 為副詞；widen 為動詞；width 為名詞。

toeic.question_en: The contract clearly states that all payments must be made ___ the agreed schedule.
toeic.explanation_zh: according to 表「依照、根據」，符合「依照約定時程」之意。due to 表原因；thanks to 表多虧；prior to 表之前。

toeic.question_en: ___ the meeting was scheduled for 10 a.m., it actually started at 10:30 due to a delay.
toeic.explanation_zh: 後面有完整子句，須用連接詞，且語意為「儘管」，故選 Although。Despite 是介系詞；However 是副詞，需用分號連接；Because 表原因，語意不符。

toeic.question_en: The hotel offers complimentary breakfast to all guests ___ in deluxe rooms.
toeic.explanation_zh: guests 與 stay 為主動關係（客人住宿），且為簡化關係子句（who are staying），用現在分詞 staying。

toeic.question_en: Please make sure your laptop is ___ before joining the video conference.
toeic.explanation_zh: be + 過去分詞 表狀態，「被充飽電的狀態」用 charged。charging 是現在分詞表「正在充電」，語意不符 make sure 後的狀態描述。

toeic.question_en: The new employee orientation will take place ___ the first floor conference room.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「在第幾樓」用 on the floor。in 通常用於封閉空間內；at 用於地點；to 表方向。

toeic.question_en: The marketing director, ___ proposal was selected, will receive a special bonus.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「她的提案」表所屬關係，用所有格關代 whose。who 為主格；whom 為受格；which 用於事物。

toeic.question_en: Ms. Chen ___ the position last week, but she is still considering the offer.
toeic.explanation_zh: Chen 是「被提供職位」，用被動語態，且 last week 為過去時間，故用過去被動 was offered。

toeic.question_en: The renovation project will be completed ___ schedule despite several setbacks.
toeic.explanation_zh: on schedule 為固定片語，意為「按時、如期」。其他介系詞與 schedule 搭配為不同含義或不正確。

toeic.question_en: The committee members reached ___ agreement after several hours of negotiation.
toeic.explanation_zh: reach an agreement 為固定搭配，意為「達成協議」。agreement 以母音開頭，故用 an。

toeic.question_en: Our IT department recommends ___ your password every three months for security purposes.
toeic.explanation_zh: recommend + 動名詞為固定搭配。也可說 recommend that you change，但若直接接動詞則用 -ing 形式。

toeic.question_en: The package will be delivered ___ Monday morning at the latest.
toeic.explanation_zh: by 表「不晚於某時間」，搭配 at the latest（最遲）強化此意。until 用於持續到某時為止的動作；for 表時間長度；since 表起點。

toeic.question_en: The presentation was so ___ that several attendees fell asleep.
toeic.explanation_zh: presentation 是事物，用主動現在分詞 boring 表「令人厭倦的」。bored 用於人感到厭倦。

toeic.question_en: Customers may return defective products ___ they present the original receipt.
toeic.explanation_zh: provided that 表「只要、條件是」，符合「只要出示原收據就可退貨」之意。in case 表「以防」；so that 表目的；even though 表讓步。

toeic.question_en: By the time the consultant arrives, the team ___ the preliminary report.
toeic.explanation_zh: By the time + 現在式 (arrives) 主句用未來完成式 will have + 過去分詞，表示在未來某時間點之前已完成的動作。

toeic.question_en: The accounting department is responsible ___ processing all expense reimbursements.
toeic.explanation_zh: be responsible for + 名詞/動名詞 為固定搭配，表「對...負責」。

toeic.question_en: The CFO suggested that the marketing budget ___ by 20 percent next year.
toeic.explanation_zh: suggest that 後虛擬語氣，用原形動詞，且 budget 為被動，故用 be + 過去分詞 (be increased)。

toeic.question_en: The training session was ___ informative that all participants gave positive feedback.
toeic.explanation_zh: so + 形容詞 + that 子句 表「如此...以致於」。such + 名詞 + that；too 表過於；very 為強調但不接 that 子句結構。

toeic.question_en: Employees are encouraged to ___ advantage of the company's professional development programs.
toeic.explanation_zh: take advantage of 為固定片語，意為「利用」。其他動詞無法與 advantage 構成此固定搭配。

toeic.question_en: The new safety regulations apply not only to factory workers ___ to office staff.
toeic.explanation_zh: not only...but also... 為固定相關連接詞，意為「不僅...而且...」。

toeic.question_en: The merger between the two firms is expected to ___ over 200 new jobs.
toeic.explanation_zh: be expected to + 原形動詞，故選 (A) create。

toeic.question_en: The hotel's room rates vary ___ on the season and availability.
toeic.explanation_zh: depending on 為固定片語，意為「取決於」。此處 depending 是分詞構句修飾動詞 vary。

toeic.question_en: Had we known about the discount earlier, we ___ a larger order.
toeic.explanation_zh: 倒裝句 Had we known 等於 If we had known，與過去事實相反，主句用 would have + 過去分詞。

toeic.question_en: Mr. Park's promotion to vice president was ___ to the entire staff at the annual gala.
toeic.explanation_zh: be + 過去分詞 構成被動語態，promotion 是「被宣布」，故用 announced。

toeic.question_en: The seminar will cover various topics, ___ time management and effective communication.
toeic.explanation_zh: including 為介系詞，意為「包括」，後接舉例。include 為動詞；included 為過去分詞置於名詞後；inclusion 為名詞。

toeic.question_en: Please refer to the attached document ___ further details about the new procedures.
toeic.explanation_zh: refer to ... for + 名詞 表「為了某事而參考...」。此處 for further details 表「想了解更多細節」。

toeic.question_en: The board members unanimously voted ___ favor of the proposed restructuring plan.
toeic.explanation_zh: in favor of 為固定片語，意為「贊成、支持」。其他介系詞與 favor 搭配無此意。

toeic.question_en: The new mobile application has been downloaded ___ than five million times since its release.
toeic.explanation_zh: more than + 數字 表「超過」。most 為最高級；much 與 many 不能直接接 than 與數字搭配此意。

toeic.question_en: The marketing team submitted a ___ proposal that impressed the board of directors.
toeic.explanation_zh: 空格修飾名詞 proposal，需用形容詞 successful（成功的）。

toeic.question_en: By the time the quarterly report is released, the auditors ___ their review for three weeks.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「By the time...」搭配「for three weeks」表示到未來某時點為止已持續進行的動作，需用未來完成進行式 will have been conducting。

toeic.question_en: All new ___ are required to attend the orientation session on Monday morning.
toeic.explanation_zh: 句意指新進「員工」需參加說明會，且動詞為 are，需用複數名詞 employees。

toeic.question_en: The contract ___ by both parties before the end of the fiscal year.
toeic.explanation_zh: 主詞 contract 被簽署，需用被動語態 must be signed。

toeic.question_en: Neither the manager nor the assistants ___ aware of the schedule change.
toeic.explanation_zh: Neither A nor B 的動詞依靠近 B（assistants，複數），故用 were。

toeic.question_en: If the shipment ___ on time, we would not have lost the client.
toeic.explanation_zh: 與過去事實相反的第三類條件句，if 子句用 had + p.p.，主句用 would have + p.p.。

toeic.question_en: The CEO insisted that every department head ___ the new compliance training.
toeic.explanation_zh: insist that 後接虛擬語氣，動詞用原形 complete。

toeic.question_en: Ms. Tanaka prepared the presentation slides ___ before the client meeting.
toeic.explanation_zh: 強調主詞「親自」做某事，用反身代名詞 herself。

toeic.question_en: The committee ___ currently reviewing the budget allocation for next quarter.
toeic.explanation_zh: 集合名詞 committee 在此視為單一整體運作，搭配單數動詞 is。

toeic.question_en: Investors should be informed ___ of any significant changes in market conditions.
toeic.explanation_zh: 空格修飾動詞 be informed，需用副詞 promptly（及時地）。

toeic.question_en: The annual report ___ to all shareholders last Friday.
toeic.explanation_zh: 主詞 report 是被分發的對象，過去時間 last Friday，用過去式被動 was distributed。

toeic.question_en: Either the supervisor or the team leaders ___ responsible for approving overtime requests.
toeic.explanation_zh: Either A or B 動詞依靠近 B（team leaders，複數），故用 are。

toeic.question_en: If I ___ you, I would accept the promotion without hesitation.
toeic.explanation_zh: 與現在事實相反的第二類條件句，be 動詞統一用 were。

toeic.question_en: The negotiations between the two firms have been progressing ___ over the past month.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾動詞 have been progressing，需用副詞 steadily。

toeic.question_en: The board members ___ their final decision by next Wednesday at the latest.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「by next Wednesday」表示未來某時間點之前完成的動作，用未來完成式 will have made。

toeic.question_en: Mr. Lin recommended that the proposal ___ revised before submission.
toeic.explanation_zh: recommend that 後接虛擬語氣，動詞為 (should) be，故用 be。

toeic.question_en: All staff ___ attended the safety briefing must sign the attendance sheet.
toeic.explanation_zh: 先行詞 staff 為人，且為關係子句主詞，用 who。

toeic.question_en: The new accounting software has greatly improved the ___ of our financial reporting.
toeic.explanation_zh: the 之後需名詞，accuracy 為標準商業用名詞「準確性」。

toeic.question_en: If the supplier ___ the deadline, we will need to find an alternative vendor.
toeic.explanation_zh: 與未來事實相反的第一類條件句，if 子句用現在式 misses，主句用 will。

toeic.question_en: Every applicant ___ submit their resume and cover letter by Friday.
toeic.explanation_zh: 表示「必須」遞交資料的強制要求，用 must。

toeic.question_en: The proposal was rejected because it lacked sufficient ___ data.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾名詞 data，需用形容詞 supportive（支持性的）。

toeic.question_en: Our company ___ business with that firm since 2010.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「since 2010」表示從過去持續到現在，用現在完成式 has done。

toeic.question_en: The merger documents ___ by the legal department right now.
toeic.explanation_zh: 主詞 documents 被審閱，且 right now 表示現在進行，用 are being reviewed。

toeic.question_en: Each of the candidates ___ a different set of qualifications to the position.
toeic.explanation_zh: Each of + 複數名詞，主詞核心為 Each（單數），故用 brings。

toeic.question_en: The HR department made the announcement ___ to avoid any misunderstandings.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾動詞 made the announcement，用副詞 clearly。

toeic.question_en: Had we anticipated the demand, we ___ a larger order.
toeic.explanation_zh: 倒裝的第三類條件句 Had we anticipated...，主句用 would have + p.p.。

toeic.question_en: The conference room ___ for the quarterly meeting yesterday afternoon.
toeic.explanation_zh: 主詞為被預訂的對象，過去時間，用過去被動 was reserved。

toeic.question_en: Mr. Chen and ___ will lead the upcoming product launch event.
toeic.explanation_zh: 並列主詞之一，需主格代名詞 I。

toeic.question_en: The training program has proven to be highly ___ for our junior staff.
toeic.explanation_zh: be 動詞後接形容詞作主詞補語，用 beneficial。

toeic.question_en: Visitors ___ wear identification badges at all times while on the premises.
toeic.explanation_zh: 表示規定強制性的「必須」，用 must。

toeic.question_en: The number of overseas branches ___ doubled in the past five years.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「The number of + 複數名詞」主詞為 The number（單數），用 has。

toeic.question_en: Please send the revised contract to Ms. Wang and ___ as soon as possible.
toeic.explanation_zh: 介系詞 to 的受詞，用受格 me。

toeic.question_en: If the system had been updated regularly, the data breach ___ prevented.
toeic.explanation_zh: 與過去事實相反的第三類條件句，主句用 could have + p.p.。

toeic.question_en: The financial analyst presented her findings ___ to the executive committee.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾動詞 presented，用副詞 confidently。

toeic.question_en: By next month, the construction crew ___ the office renovation project.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「By next month」搭配未來完成式 will have completed。

toeic.question_en: It is essential that the report ___ submitted before the deadline.
toeic.explanation_zh: It is essential that 後接虛擬語氣，動詞用原形 be。

toeic.question_en: A number of employees ___ requested additional training in data analysis.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「A number of + 複數名詞」主詞視為複數，用 have。

toeic.question_en: The marketing director gave ___ a copy of the new branding guidelines.
toeic.explanation_zh: 授與動詞 gave 的間接受詞，用受格 us。

toeic.question_en: The CEO emphasized the ___ of maintaining strong client relationships.
toeic.explanation_zh: the 後需名詞，importance（重要性）正確。

toeic.question_en: Should you require further information, please ___ our customer service team.
toeic.explanation_zh: 倒裝條件句 Should you require... 等同 If you should require...，主句為祈使句，用動詞原形 contact。

toeic.question_en: The new policy ___ next Monday after final approval from the board.
toeic.explanation_zh: 主詞 policy 是被執行的對象，未來時間，用未來被動 will be implemented。

toeic.question_en: Neither of the proposals ___ been approved by the finance committee.
toeic.explanation_zh: Neither of + 複數名詞，主詞 Neither 為單數，用 has。

toeic.question_en: The interns completed the assignment ___ despite the tight deadline.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾動詞 completed，用副詞 efficiently。

toeic.question_en: Were the company to expand into Asia, profits ___ significantly.
toeic.explanation_zh: 倒裝的第二類條件句 Were the company to...，主句用 would + 原形動詞。

toeic.question_en: The auditors ___ the books for three days before discovering the discrepancy.
toeic.explanation_zh: 在過去某動作（discovered）之前已持續進行的動作，用過去完成進行式 had been examining。

toeic.question_en: All packages ___ to the receiving department on the ground floor.
toeic.explanation_zh: 主詞 packages 是被遞送的對象，用 should be delivered。

toeic.question_en: Mathematics ___ a required subject for all business management students.
toeic.explanation_zh: 學科名稱 Mathematics 雖以 -s 結尾，但視為單數，用 is。

toeic.question_en: The marketing team submitted ___ proposal to the client yesterday.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾名詞 proposal 需所有格，用 their。

toeic.question_en: The CFO requested that the budget report ___ revised by Friday.
toeic.explanation_zh: request that 後接虛擬語氣，被動形式 (should) be revised。

toeic.question_en: The new vending machines ___ throughout the office building last week.
toeic.explanation_zh: 主詞為被安裝的對象，過去時間，用過去被動 were installed。

toeic.question_en: We ___ have known about the schedule change if no one had told us.
toeic.explanation_zh: 與過去事實相反的第三類條件句，主句用 could not have + p.p.。

toeic.question_en: The seminar provided ___ insights into international marketing strategies.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾名詞 insights，用形容詞 valuable（寶貴的）。

toeic.question_en: By the time the project manager arrived, the team ___ the presentation.
toeic.explanation_zh: 在過去某時間點（arrived）之前完成的動作，用過去完成式 had finished。

toeic.question_en: Customer satisfaction surveys ___ conducted on a quarterly basis.
toeic.explanation_zh: 主詞 surveys 為複數，被動語態用 are conducted。

toeic.question_en: The HR manager and ___ assistant will conduct the interviews next Monday.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾名詞 assistant 需所有格，用 her。

toeic.question_en: The marketing campaign was so ___ that sales doubled within a month.
toeic.explanation_zh: be 動詞 was 後接形容詞作主詞補語，用 effective。

toeic.question_en: Visitors ___ park in the spaces reserved for executives.
toeic.explanation_zh: 表示禁止行為，用 must not（不可）。

toeic.question_en: If the manager ___ available, please leave a message with the receptionist.
toeic.explanation_zh: 第一類條件句表示真實可能，if 子句用現在式 is not。

toeic.question_en: The company ___ its operations to Southeast Asia over the next two years.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「over the next two years」指未來時間，用 will expand。

toeic.question_en: Ms. Park designed the entire marketing brochure by ___.
toeic.explanation_zh: by oneself 表示「獨自地」，用反身代名詞 herself。

toeic.question_en: The committee suggested that the deadline ___ extended by two weeks.
toeic.explanation_zh: suggest that 後接虛擬語氣，被動形式用 (should) be extended。

toeic.question_en: The accountant has been working on the tax forms ___ since this morning.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾動詞 working，用副詞 diligently。

toeic.question_en: All sales representatives ___ to attend the product training workshop.
toeic.explanation_zh: 主詞 representatives 是被要求的對象，用被動 are required。

toeic.question_en: Twenty thousand dollars ___ a reasonable budget for this marketing initiative.
toeic.explanation_zh: 金額視為單一整體，用單數動詞 is。

toeic.question_en: The new branch office in Singapore opened last month, and ___ has been performing exceptionally well.
toeic.explanation_zh: 代替前面提到的 office 作為主詞，用主格代名詞 it。

toeic.question_en: The proposal received unanimous ___ from all members of the board.
toeic.explanation_zh: 形容詞 unanimous 後接名詞，用 approval（核可）。

toeic.question_en: The contract negotiations ___ for over three hours when an agreement was finally reached.
toeic.explanation_zh: 在過去某動作（agreement was reached）之前已持續進行的動作，用過去完成進行式 had been lasting。

toeic.question_en: Each of the departments ___ its own annual budget proposal.
toeic.explanation_zh: Each of + 複數名詞，主詞 Each 為單數，用 submits。

toeic.question_en: The renovation project must ___ before the end of the quarter.
toeic.explanation_zh: 主詞 project 是被完成的對象，需被動 be completed。

toeic.question_en: If we ___ the contract last year, we would be in a much better position now.
toeic.explanation_zh: 混合條件句，if 子句指過去（last year）用 had signed，主句指現在用 would be。

toeic.question_en: The trainee took notes ___ throughout the entire workshop.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾動詞 took，用副詞 carefully。

toeic.question_en: The shareholders ___ informed of the merger details next week.
toeic.explanation_zh: 主詞為被告知的對象，未來時間，用未來被動 will be informed。

toeic.question_en: Either the director or the assistant managers ___ presenting at the conference.
toeic.explanation_zh: Either A or B 動詞依靠近 B（managers，複數），用 are。

toeic.question_en: The board members congratulated ___ on the successful merger.
toeic.explanation_zh: 動詞 congratulated 的受詞，用受格 us。

toeic.question_en: Mr. Yamada has demonstrated ___ leadership skills during his time at the company.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾名詞 leadership skills，用形容詞 exceptional（卓越的）。

toeic.question_en: The board recommended that the CEO ___ a more conservative investment strategy.
toeic.explanation_zh: recommend that 後接虛擬語氣，動詞用原形 adopt。

toeic.question_en: By the end of this fiscal year, our team ___ over 500 client accounts.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「By the end of this fiscal year」指未來時點，用未來完成式 will have managed。

toeic.question_en: The customer service representatives ___ trained extensively before being assigned to the call center.
toeic.explanation_zh: 主詞 representatives 為複數，被動式過去時間用 were trained。

toeic.question_en: Although the deadline was tight, the report was completed ___.
toeic.explanation_zh: 表示「準時」的副詞片語為 on time。

toeic.question_en: If you ___ any questions, please feel free to contact the human resources department.
toeic.explanation_zh: 第一類條件句表示真實可能，if 子句用現在式 have。

toeic.question_en: The senior accountant should ___ the report before submitting it to the audit team.
toeic.explanation_zh: 情態動詞 should 後接動詞原形 review。

toeic.question_en: The economics department ___ holding a seminar on global trade next Friday.
toeic.explanation_zh: 集合名詞 department 視為單一整體，用單數 is。

toeic.question_en: The new product line has been very ___ received by consumers in Europe.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾過去分詞 received，用副詞 favorably。

toeic.question_en: We were so impressed by ___ professionalism during the negotiation.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾名詞 professionalism 需所有格，用 their。

toeic.question_en: Had the manager checked the figures, the error ___ noticed earlier.
toeic.explanation_zh: 倒裝第三類條件句 Had the manager checked...，主句用 would have + p.p. (被動 been + p.p.)。

toeic.question_en: The president addressed the audience ___ at the annual general meeting.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾動詞 addressed，用副詞 eloquently（雄辯地）。

toeic.question_en: All overseas shipments ___ insured against potential damage.
toeic.explanation_zh: 主詞 shipments 是被投保的對象，用 must be insured。

toeic.question_en: The number of complaints ___ decreased significantly since the new policy was implemented.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「The number of + 複數名詞」主詞 number 為單數，用 has。

toeic.question_en: The IT specialist explained the new software features clearly to ___.
toeic.explanation_zh: 介系詞 to 的受詞，用受格 us。

toeic.question_en: The auditor expressed ___ regarding the accuracy of the financial statements.
toeic.explanation_zh: expressed 的受詞，需名詞 concern（關切）。

toeic.question_en: The technical team ___ on the system upgrade for the past two weeks.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「for the past two weeks」表示從過去持續到現在仍進行，用現在完成進行式 has been working。

toeic.question_en: The annual conference ___ in Tokyo next May.
toeic.explanation_zh: 主詞 conference 是被舉辦的對象，未來時間，用未來被動 will be held。

toeic.question_en: It is imperative that every applicant ___ the required documents on time.
toeic.explanation_zh: It is imperative that 後接虛擬語氣，動詞用原形 submit。

toeic.question_en: The marketing strategy was developed ___ by the senior consultants.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾動詞 was developed，用副詞 creatively。

toeic.question_en: If sales ___ to decline next quarter, we may need to revise our forecast.
toeic.explanation_zh: 第一類條件句表示真實可能，if 子句用現在式 continue。

toeic.question_en: The newly hired analyst introduced ___ to the entire department on the first day.
toeic.explanation_zh: 主詞和受詞為同一人（the analyst 介紹自己），用反身代名詞 himself。

toeic.question_en: The board of directors ___ the proposed acquisition during yesterday's meeting.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「yesterday's meeting」指過去時間，用過去式 discussed。

toeic.question_en: The consultant ___ presented the quarterly report has been promoted to senior partner.
toeic.explanation_zh: 先行詞為人 (consultant)，且為關係子句的主詞，故用主格關係代名詞 who。

toeic.question_en: Our new headquarters, ___ is located in downtown Singapore, will open next month.
toeic.explanation_zh: 非限定關係子句 (有逗號) 不可用 that；先行詞為地點但作主詞，故用 which 而非 where。

toeic.question_en: The candidate ___ resume impressed the hiring manager will be invited for a second interview.
toeic.explanation_zh: 後接名詞 resume 表示「他的履歷」，需用所有格關係代名詞 whose。

toeic.question_en: The training session ___ we attended last Friday provided valuable insights into project management.
toeic.explanation_zh: 先行詞為物 (training session)，且為及物動詞 attended 的受詞，故用 which 或 that。

toeic.question_en: We are looking for a venue ___ we can host the annual shareholders meeting.
toeic.explanation_zh: 先行詞為地點 (venue)，且後接完整句子，故用關係副詞 where。

toeic.question_en: The day ___ the merger was finalized will be remembered as a turning point in the company history.
toeic.explanation_zh: 先行詞為時間 (day)，且後接完整子句，故用關係副詞 when。

toeic.question_en: Please submit the documents ___ are required for the audit by Friday.
toeic.explanation_zh: 先行詞為物 (documents)，作子句主詞，限定用法可用 that 或 which。

toeic.question_en: The employees ___ in the cafeteria are discussing the new policy.
toeic.explanation_zh: 減化關係子句，主動意義用現在分詞 sitting (= who are sitting)。

toeic.question_en: The report ___ yesterday contains several inaccuracies that must be corrected.
toeic.explanation_zh: 報告「被提交」，被動意義用過去分詞 submitted (= which was submitted)。

toeic.question_en: Mr. Chen, ___ I worked with on the Tokyo project, has accepted a position in Berlin.
toeic.explanation_zh: 先行詞為人，作介系詞 with 的受詞，正式用法用 whom。

toeic.question_en: The proposal was rejected, ___ disappointed the entire marketing team.
toeic.explanation_zh: 非限定用法代指整個前句的事件，用 which，不可用 that。

toeic.question_en: We need to find someone ___ can lead the international expansion project.
toeic.explanation_zh: 先行詞 someone 為人，作子句主詞，用 who。

toeic.question_en: The vendor ___ products we purchased last quarter has filed for bankruptcy.
toeic.explanation_zh: 後接名詞 products 表示「廠商的產品」，需用所有格 whose。

toeic.question_en: The reason ___ the launch was postponed remains confidential.
toeic.explanation_zh: 先行詞為 reason，表原因，用關係副詞 why。

toeic.question_en: All applicants ___ for the internship must submit a cover letter.
toeic.explanation_zh: 減化關係子句，主動意義 (= who are applying) 用現在分詞 applying。

toeic.question_en: The CEO addressed the concerns ___ by shareholders at the annual meeting.
toeic.explanation_zh: concerns 為被提出的對象，被動用過去分詞 raised (= which were raised)。

toeic.question_en: Our company offers competitive salaries ___ generous benefits to all full-time employees.
toeic.explanation_zh: 兩項福利為並列關係，用對等連接詞 and。

toeic.question_en: The team worked overtime for weeks, ___ they still missed the deadline.
toeic.explanation_zh: 前後語意對比 (努力卻仍錯過)，用 yet 表「然而」。

toeic.question_en: You may pay by credit card ___ bank transfer at checkout.
toeic.explanation_zh: 提供兩種付款方式選擇，用 or。

toeic.question_en: The negotiations were difficult, ___ both parties eventually reached an agreement.
toeic.explanation_zh: 前後對比 (困難 vs 達成協議)，用 but。

toeic.question_en: The factory was forced to close ___ the equipment failure caused major safety concerns.
toeic.explanation_zh: 後句說明關閉的原因，用 because 引導原因子句。

toeic.question_en: ___ the report was completed on time, the client requested several revisions.
toeic.explanation_zh: 前後語意讓步 (雖然準時完成，仍要求修改)，用 although。

toeic.question_en: We will sign the contract ___ all terms are mutually agreed upon.
toeic.explanation_zh: provided that「假如、只要」表條件，符合語境。

toeic.question_en: The shipment will not be released ___ the outstanding invoice is paid.
toeic.explanation_zh: unless = if not「除非」，表示付款是放貨的必要條件。

toeic.question_en: ___ the marketing team focuses on digital channels, the sales team prefers face-to-face meetings.
toeic.explanation_zh: whereas「然而、相反地」用於兩者對比。

toeic.question_en: Please keep your receipt ___ you need to return the item.
toeic.explanation_zh: in case「以防萬一」表預防性條件，符合語境。

toeic.question_en: ___ the new software has been installed, productivity has increased significantly.
toeic.explanation_zh: since「自從」搭配現在完成式，表示從過去某時延續至今。

toeic.question_en: The factory will continue operating ___ raw materials remain available.
toeic.explanation_zh: as long as「只要」表條件，原料供應是運轉條件。

toeic.question_en: The board approved the budget; ___, implementation will begin next quarter.
toeic.explanation_zh: 前因 (預算通過) 後果 (將執行)，用 therefore。

toeic.question_en: Sales declined in the third quarter; ___, the company remains profitable overall.
toeic.explanation_zh: 前後對比 (下滑但仍獲利)，用 nevertheless「儘管如此」。

toeic.question_en: The product passed all safety tests; ___, it received regulatory approval.
toeic.explanation_zh: 前因後果，用 consequently「因此」。

toeic.question_en: The new policy improves work-life balance; ___, it reduces operating costs.
toeic.explanation_zh: 增添另一項好處，用 moreover「此外」。

toeic.question_en: The proposal seems promising; ___, we need to analyze the financial risks carefully.
toeic.explanation_zh: 前後對比 (看似可行但仍需評估風險)，用 however。

toeic.question_en: The merger faced regulatory hurdles; ___, both companies eventually completed the deal.
toeic.explanation_zh: 前後對比 (遇阻礙但仍完成)，用 nonetheless「儘管如此」。

toeic.question_en: Demand for the product has surged; ___, we are expanding the production line.
toeic.explanation_zh: accordingly「因此、相應地」表結果。

toeic.question_en: The Asian market grew by 15 percent; ___, the European market contracted by 5 percent.
toeic.explanation_zh: in contrast「相比之下」用於兩個市場表現對比。

toeic.question_en: The team finalized the design; ___, they began preparing marketing materials.
toeic.explanation_zh: furthermore「此外」表示再做另一項事務。

toeic.question_en: All proposals must be submitted ___ the deadline of June 30.
toeic.explanation_zh: by + 截止時間「在...之前完成」，符合 deadline 語意。

toeic.question_en: The board meeting will be held ___ Tuesday morning in the executive boardroom.
toeic.explanation_zh: 特定日期 (Tuesday) 用介系詞 on。

toeic.question_en: We would like to discuss several concerns ___ the new compliance policy.
toeic.explanation_zh: regarding「關於」為商業常用介系詞。

toeic.question_en: Ms. Yamada will sign the agreement ___ the chairman, who is currently overseas.
toeic.explanation_zh: on behalf of「代表」某人行事，符合語境。

toeic.question_en: ___ the recent market downturn, we have decided to delay the IPO.
toeic.explanation_zh: in light of「鑑於」表考量某情況而做決定。

toeic.question_en: The flight was cancelled ___ severe weather conditions.
toeic.explanation_zh: owing to + 名詞「由於」，後接名詞片語 weather conditions。

toeic.question_en: All offers are ___ approval by the executive committee.
toeic.explanation_zh: subject to「須經...批准、取決於」為商業常用片語。

toeic.question_en: ___ the final audit, the funds will be held in an escrow account.
toeic.explanation_zh: pending「在...期間、有待」作介系詞用，符合審計期間之意。

toeic.question_en: All employees must comply with company policy ___ section 4.2 of the handbook.
toeic.explanation_zh: pursuant to「依據、根據」為正式法律商業用語。

toeic.question_en: Please confirm your attendance ___ Friday so we can finalize the seating arrangements.
toeic.explanation_zh: by Friday「在週五之前完成」，表 deadline。

toeic.question_en: ___ the rising costs, the company managed to maintain its profit margin.
toeic.explanation_zh: despite + 名詞片語 (the rising costs)，其他選項為連接詞接子句。

toeic.question_en: ___ he was exhausted, the manager continued to work on the presentation.
toeic.explanation_zh: 後接完整子句 (he was exhausted)，用連接詞 although。

toeic.question_en: ___ the difficult market conditions, the firm posted record profits last year.
toeic.explanation_zh: 後接名詞片語 (the difficult market conditions)，用介系詞片語 in spite of。

toeic.question_en: The new system is far ___ than the previous one in terms of processing speed.
toeic.explanation_zh: 句中有 than，且 far 修飾比較級，用 more efficient。

toeic.question_en: Of all the candidates interviewed, Ms. Lee is ___ qualified for the position.
toeic.explanation_zh: of all 表示在所有人中，用最高級 the most。

toeic.question_en: The Q4 results were not ___ impressive as those of Q3.
toeic.explanation_zh: as...as 同等比較，否定句中常用 not as...as。

toeic.question_en: The more training employees receive, ___ their performance becomes.
toeic.explanation_zh: the more...the more/better 句型，後半需用 the + 比較級。

toeic.question_en: This year sales figures are significantly ___ than last year results.
toeic.explanation_zh: 後有 than，用比較級 higher。

toeic.question_en: The CEO emphasized that the new strategy is ___ ambitious than realistic.
toeic.explanation_zh: less + 形容詞 + than 表「比較不...」。

toeic.question_en: Our team is responsible for designing, developing, and ___ new software solutions.
toeic.explanation_zh: 平行結構：與前面 designing, developing 並列，用 V-ing 形式 testing。

toeic.question_en: The seminar will cover both leadership skills ___ team management techniques.
toeic.explanation_zh: both...and 為平行結構固定搭配。

toeic.question_en: The candidate is not only highly qualified ___ also fluent in three languages.
toeic.explanation_zh: not only...but also 為平行結構固定搭配。

toeic.question_en: You can reach the customer service department either by phone ___ by email.
toeic.explanation_zh: either...or 為平行結構固定搭配。

toeic.question_en: Neither the manager ___ the supervisor was available for comment.
toeic.explanation_zh: neither...nor 為平行結構固定搭配。

toeic.question_en: The new role requires excellent communication skills, attention to detail, and ___ to work under pressure.
toeic.explanation_zh: 與前面名詞 skills, attention 並列，需用名詞 ability。

toeic.question_en: Effective managers know how to motivate their teams, delegate tasks, and ___ constructive feedback.
toeic.explanation_zh: 與 motivate, delegate 原形動詞並列，用 provide。

toeic.question_en: The training program focuses on improving productivity, enhancing collaboration, and ___ employee morale.
toeic.explanation_zh: 與 improving, enhancing 並列，用 V-ing 形式 boosting。

toeic.question_en: Never ___ such a rapid increase in online sales as we have this year.
toeic.explanation_zh: 否定副詞 never 置句首引發倒裝，現在完成式倒裝為 has + 主詞 + p.p.。

toeic.question_en: Hardly ___ the office ___ the phone started ringing.
toeic.explanation_zh: hardly...when 句型，hardly 置句首引發過去完成式倒裝。

toeic.question_en: Not only ___ the deadline, but the team also exceeded expectations.
toeic.explanation_zh: not only 置句首引發倒裝，過去式需借助助動詞 did。

toeic.question_en: Scarcely ___ the contract ___ the client requested changes.
toeic.explanation_zh: scarcely...when 句型，須過去完成式倒裝。

toeic.question_en: ___ had the meeting started than the fire alarm sounded.
toeic.explanation_zh: no sooner...than 為固定搭配，hardly/scarcely 須搭配 when。

toeic.question_en: ___ I known about the schedule change, I would have rearranged my flight.
toeic.explanation_zh: 省略 if 的第三條件句倒裝：Had + 主詞 + p.p.。

toeic.question_en: ___ you have any questions about the policy, please contact human resources.
toeic.explanation_zh: Should + 主詞 + 原形 = If you should have，正式商業用語。

toeic.question_en: ___ she to accept our offer, she would relocate to our New York office.
toeic.explanation_zh: Were + 主詞 + to V = If 主詞 were to V，第二條件句倒裝。

toeic.question_en: Under no circumstances ___ confidential information be shared with third parties.
toeic.explanation_zh: 否定副詞片語 under no circumstances 置句首引發倒裝。

toeic.question_en: Rarely ___ such a comprehensive proposal from a new vendor.
toeic.explanation_zh: rarely 為否定副詞，置句首引發完成式倒裝。

toeic.question_en: ___ through the new office, the visitors were impressed by the modern design.
toeic.explanation_zh: 現在分詞片語表主動同時動作，visitors 在走，用 Walking。

toeic.question_en: ___ the report, the analyst began preparing the presentation.
toeic.explanation_zh: 完成式分詞 Having + p.p. 表示動作在主要動詞之前完成。

toeic.question_en: ___ in 1985, the company has grown into a multinational corporation.
toeic.explanation_zh: 公司被創立，用過去分詞 Founded 表被動。

toeic.question_en: ___ by the board, the new strategy will be implemented next quarter.
toeic.explanation_zh: 策略「被」核准，用過去分詞 Approved 表被動。

toeic.question_en: ___ for over two decades, Mr. Tanaka brings extensive experience to his new role.
toeic.explanation_zh: Having worked 表示在主要動詞之前已持續完成的動作。

toeic.question_en: ___ the contract carefully, we noticed several clauses that needed revision.
toeic.explanation_zh: we 主動審閱，用現在分詞 Reviewing 表同時或先後的動作。

toeic.question_en: ___ in a hurry, the proposal contained several typographical errors.
toeic.explanation_zh: 提案「被」匆忙撰寫，用過去分詞 Written 表被動。

toeic.question_en: ___ at the conference, the speaker received a standing ovation.
toeic.explanation_zh: Having arrived 表抵達後 (動作先於主要動詞) 獲得起立鼓掌。

toeic.question_en: While ___ the financial statements, the auditor identified several irregularities.
toeic.explanation_zh: while + V-ing 表主動進行的動作，稽核員主動檢查。

toeic.question_en: The keynote speaker, ___ for her expertise in fintech, will address the conference tomorrow.
toeic.explanation_zh: be known for「以...著稱」為被動，減化關係子句用 known。

toeic.question_en: The factory ___ in Vietnam produces electronic components for global markets.
toeic.explanation_zh: 工廠「位於」用 located (= which is located)，被動語意。

toeic.question_en: All employees ___ the safety training must sign the attendance sheet.
toeic.explanation_zh: 員工主動參加，減化關係子句用 V-ing 形式 attending。

toeic.question_en: The contract, ___ by both parties last week, will take effect on January 1.
toeic.explanation_zh: 合約「被」雙方簽署，用過去分詞 signed (= which was signed)。

toeic.question_en: The delegation, ___ several senior executives, arrived at the airport this morning.
toeic.explanation_zh: including「包括」為介系詞，表示包含的對象。

toeic.question_en: The merger talks resumed ___ a three-month suspension due to regulatory concerns.
toeic.explanation_zh: following + 名詞「在...之後」，表示三個月暫停後恢復。

toeic.question_en: Please review the attached document ___ to the next meeting.
toeic.explanation_zh: prior to「在...之前」為介系詞片語，後接名詞 the next meeting。

toeic.question_en: The candidate has experience ___ supply chain management and logistics.
toeic.explanation_zh: experience in + 某領域，為固定搭配。

toeic.question_en: The committee will issue a decision ___ further consultation with legal counsel.
toeic.explanation_zh: pending「有待、在...之前」表示在進一步諮詢之前不會發布。

toeic.question_en: ___ as soon as we finish the negotiation, we will inform all stakeholders.
toeic.explanation_zh: 原句首已有暗示，as soon as「一...就...」符合通知時機。

toeic.question_en: ___ the manager arrived, the meeting had already started.
toeic.explanation_zh: by the time + 過去式，主句搭配過去完成式，表「等到...時已經」。

toeic.question_en: The CEO finalized the merger; ___, the CFO presented the financial forecast.
toeic.explanation_zh: meanwhile「同時」表兩件事同時發生。

toeic.question_en: The supplier offered a discount, ___ saved the company over twenty thousand dollars.
toeic.explanation_zh: 非限定用法代指整個前句的事件 (提供折扣)，用 which。

toeic.question_en: All staff members ___ in the survey will receive a complimentary gift card.
toeic.explanation_zh: 員工主動參加，減化關係子句用 V-ing 形式 participating。

toeic.question_en: The findings ___ in the report will be presented at the next board meeting.
toeic.explanation_zh: findings「被」概述於報告中，用過去分詞 outlined 表被動。

toeic.question_en: Little ___ that his presentation would lead to a major investment deal.
toeic.explanation_zh: 否定副詞 little「幾乎不」置句首引發倒裝，過去式用 did + 原形。

toeic.question_en: The board of directors will ___ a decision regarding the merger by the end of the quarter.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「make a decision」是固定搭配，意為「做出決定」。其他選項皆不可與 decision 搭配使用。

toeic.question_en: After lengthy negotiations, both parties finally ___ an agreement on the contract terms.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「reach an agreement」為標準搭配，意為「達成協議」。arrive 須加 at，雖文法可，但 reach 更為常用且直接。

toeic.question_en: Customer satisfaction remains our top ___ this fiscal year.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「top priority」是固定搭配，意為「最優先事項」。其他詞彙不能與 top 形成此種商業用語。

toeic.question_en: We would like to ___ an order for 500 units of your new product line.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「place an order」是商業英語固定搭配，意為「下訂單」。其他動詞均不可與 order 搭配此意。

toeic.question_en: The CEO strongly ___ that all employees attend the annual training session.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「strongly recommend」為固定副詞搭配。suggest 通常與 highly 搭配較少；recommend 與 strongly 為標準商業用語。

toeic.question_en: The new policy will significantly ___ our operations next year.
toeic.explanation_zh: affect 為動詞，意為「影響」；effect 為名詞，意為「效果」。此處需要動詞，故選 affect。

toeic.question_en: Please ___ with the client tomorrow to confirm the meeting details.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「follow up」意為「跟進、後續聯絡」，常用於商業情境中確認事項。follow through 則指「貫徹執行」。

toeic.question_en: The project is currently ___ schedule due to unexpected delays.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「behind schedule」意為「進度落後」，是商業常用片語。ahead of schedule 則表示「進度超前」。

toeic.question_en: We need to ___ a new solution to address this recurring problem.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「come up with」意為「想出、提出」，常用於提出新點子或方案。其他片語意義不同。

toeic.question_en: The merger is expected to have a significant ___ on the stock price of our company.
toeic.explanation_zh: 此處需要名詞，effect 為名詞「影響、效果」。affect 為動詞，不可用於此處。

toeic.question_en: Our manager always ___ valuable advice to junior staff members.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「give advice」是標準搭配。advice 為不可數名詞，不能與 make 或 do 搭配。

toeic.question_en: The accountant will ___ all financial records before the audit.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「carefully review」為固定副詞搭配，且 will 後須接原形動詞，故選 carefully review。

toeic.question_en: After three months of preparation, we are ready to ___ the new marketing campaign.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「carry out」意為「執行、實施」，常用於計畫或任務。carry on 則為「繼續」。

toeic.question_en: The HR department will ___ a thorough background check on all candidates.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「conduct a check / investigation / survey」為正式商業搭配。conduct 比 do 更正式且專業。

toeic.question_en: We sincerely ___ for the inconvenience caused by the system outage.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「sincerely apologize」為固定副詞搭配，是正式商業道歉用語。sorry 為形容詞，不可直接用於此處。

toeic.question_en: The committee will ___ the issue at the meeting next week.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「address an issue」意為「處理問題」，是商業正式用語。其他動詞無此用法。

toeic.question_en: All team members should be ___ the same page regarding project goals.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「on the same page」為商業慣用語，意為「達成共識、想法一致」。

toeic.question_en: The new manager hit the ground ___ on her first day at the office.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「hit the ground running」為商業慣用語，意為「迅速進入狀況、立即展開行動」。

toeic.question_en: Please ___ this form and return it to the HR department by Friday.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「fill in」或「fill out」均可指「填寫表格」。fill on/at/by 皆非正確搭配。

toeic.question_en: The financial situation of the company has improved ___ the long run.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「in the long run」為固定片語，意為「長遠來看」。介系詞必須用 in。

toeic.question_en: We must ___ our deadline to maintain the trust of our clients.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「meet a deadline」是標準搭配，意為「按時完成、達到截止期限」。

toeic.question_en: The training program will help employees ___ new skills quickly.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「pick up」意為「學會、掌握」技能或語言。其他選項意義不符。

toeic.question_en: She was promoted because she consistently ___ responsibility for difficult tasks.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「take responsibility」是固定搭配，意為「承擔責任」。

toeic.question_en: The CEO would like to ___ attention to the new safety protocols.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「draw attention to」為標準搭配，意為「引起對某事的注意」。

toeic.question_en: We need to ___ a precedent for handling these types of complaints.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「set a precedent」是固定搭配，意為「建立先例」。

toeic.question_en: The marketing report ___ of three main sections covering different regions.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「consist of」為固定搭配，意為「由...組成」。comprise 不可與 of 連用；compose 為被動式 be composed of。

toeic.question_en: Please ___ that all documents are signed before submission.
toeic.explanation_zh: ensure 意為「確保（事情發生）」；insure 為「投保」；assure 為「向某人保證」。此處用 ensure 最適當。

toeic.question_en: The two departments work well together; their skills ___ each other.
toeic.explanation_zh: complement 意為「互補」；compliment 為「讚美」。此處指技能互補，故用 complement。

toeic.question_en: Our company operates on the ___ of transparency and integrity.
toeic.explanation_zh: principle 為名詞「原則」；principal 為「主要的」或「校長/本金」。此處指原則，故用 principle。

toeic.question_en: The financial advisor gave us ___ on long-term investments.
toeic.explanation_zh: advice 為名詞「建議」，不可數；advise 為動詞「建議」。此處需名詞，故選 advice。

toeic.question_en: The new manager is very ___ to employee concerns and feedback.
toeic.explanation_zh: sensitive 意為「敏感的、體諒的」；sensible 意為「明智的、合理的」。此處指對員工感受敏銳，故用 sensitive。

toeic.question_en: Buying in bulk is more ___ for small businesses.
toeic.explanation_zh: economical 意為「節省的、划算的」；economic 意為「經濟的、與經濟學相關的」。此處指划算，故用 economical。

toeic.question_en: The new intern was asked to ___ the duties of the senior manager during her vacation.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「take over」意為「接手、接管」職務或業務。take on 為「承擔」；take up 為「開始從事」。

toeic.question_en: The proposal was ___ until further notice due to budget constraints.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「put off」意為「延後、推遲」。其他片語意義不同。

toeic.question_en: We have ___ funds for the marketing campaign this month.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「run out of」意為「用完、耗盡」，後接受詞。run out 後不可直接接名詞。

toeic.question_en: Please ___ your timesheet to your supervisor by 5 PM Friday.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「hand in」意為「繳交、提交」文件或作業。其他片語意義不符。

toeic.question_en: The IT team will ___ the new server system next weekend.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「set up」意為「設置、建立」系統或設備。set out 為「啟程、開始」。

toeic.question_en: We need to ___ all the documents before the meeting starts.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「go over」意為「仔細檢查、複習」文件或細節。go through 也可，但 go over 更強調逐項審視。

toeic.question_en: The accountant will ___ the discrepancy in the financial report.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「figure out」意為「弄清楚、搞懂」原因或答案。find out 強調「發現」資訊。

toeic.question_en: The company has a ___ schedule due to multiple upcoming product launches.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「tight schedule」為固定搭配，意為「行程緊湊」。其他形容詞不可與 schedule 形成此意。

toeic.question_en: Senior management plays a ___ role in shaping company strategy.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「key role」為固定搭配，意為「關鍵角色」。雖然 main 和 major 也可用於某些情境，但「key role」是最常用的商業搭配。

toeic.question_en: Please share any ___ information that may help with the investigation.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「vital information」為固定搭配，意為「重要資訊」。其他形容詞意義不同。

toeic.question_en: The auditor conducted a ___ review of all financial transactions.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「comprehensive review」意為「全面審查」，是商業常用搭配。其他選項意義不符。

toeic.question_en: Many shareholders ___ concerns about the financial direction of the company.
toeic.explanation_zh: raise 為及物動詞，意為「提出（問題、疑慮）」；rise 為不及物動詞。此處 concerns 為受詞，故用 raised。

toeic.question_en: The dissatisfied customer filed a formal ___ with the customer service department.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「file a complaint」為固定搭配，意為「提出正式投訴」。其他名詞與 file 搭配意義不同。

toeic.question_en: We highly ___ your continued support during this transition period.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「highly appreciate」為固定副詞搭配。其他動詞不可與 highly 形成此種商業用語。

toeic.question_en: We should try to ___ the box and develop innovative marketing strategies.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「think outside the box」為商業慣用語，意為「跳脫框架思考、創新思維」。

toeic.question_en: It is time to get the ball ___ on the new product development.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「get the ball rolling」為商業慣用語，意為「啟動、開始進行」。

toeic.question_en: The new CEO aims to ___ the bar for customer service standards.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「raise the bar」為慣用語，意為「提高標準」。raise 為及物動詞，bar 為受詞。

toeic.question_en: The investigator will ___ examine all the evidence before reaching a conclusion.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「thoroughly examine」為固定副詞搭配。thoroughly 為副詞修飾動詞 examine。

toeic.question_en: After 20 years of service, he decided to ___ from his position as director.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「step down」意為「辭職、退位」，常用於高層職位。step up 為「挺身而出」。

toeic.question_en: The new vice president will ___ a key role in restructuring the company.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「play a role」是固定搭配，意為「扮演角色、發揮作用」。

toeic.question_en: Sales figures have ___ significantly this quarter compared to last year.
toeic.explanation_zh: rise 為不及物動詞，過去分詞為 risen；raise 為及物動詞，須接受詞。此處用現在完成式 have risen。

toeic.question_en: Please ___ the documents on the conference table before the meeting begins.
toeic.explanation_zh: lay 為及物動詞「放置」，後接受詞 documents；lie 為不及物動詞「躺、位於」。此處需及物動詞 lay。

toeic.question_en: The receptionist gave the visitor a warm ___ on his appearance.
toeic.explanation_zh: compliment 意為「讚美」；complement 意為「補充、互補」。此處指讚美，故用 compliment。

toeic.question_en: The contract negotiations are ___ the cards for next month.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「on the cards」為英式慣用語，意為「即將發生、可能性高」。介系詞為 on。

toeic.question_en: The CFO had to ___ a back seat during the marketing presentation.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「take a back seat」為慣用語，意為「退居次要地位、不主導」。

toeic.question_en: The project leader is responsible for ___ through on all commitments.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「follow through」意為「貫徹執行、徹底完成」。此句強調履行承諾。

toeic.question_en: Employees are looking ___ to the annual company retreat next month.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「look forward to」為固定片語，意為「期待」，後接名詞或動名詞。

toeic.question_en: The team needs to ___ a strict deadline to complete the project on time.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「meet a deadline」為標準搭配，意為「按時完成」。strict deadline 也是固定搭配，意為「嚴格期限」。

toeic.question_en: The marketing department will ___ a survey to gather customer feedback.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「conduct a survey」為固定商業搭配，意為「進行調查」。conduct 比 do 或 make 更正式。

toeic.question_en: The new regulations will have a ___ impact on small businesses.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「significant impact」為固定形容詞名詞搭配，意為「重大影響」。需用形容詞修飾名詞 impact。

toeic.question_en: Please ___ careful attention to the safety guidelines during the training.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「pay attention to」是固定搭配，意為「注意」。其他動詞不可與 attention 形成此意。

toeic.question_en: The accountant will ___ the budget figures by the end of the week.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「work out」意為「計算、解決」；work on 為「致力於」。此處指計算出數字，故用 work out。

toeic.question_en: Our company has been ___ business with them for over a decade.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「do business with」為固定搭配，意為「與...做生意」。其他動詞均不可用於此意。

toeic.question_en: The IT department will ___ a security audit next week.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「carry out」意為「執行、實施」，常用於計畫、任務或審查。其他選項意義不符。

toeic.question_en: She was praised for her ability to ___ a profit even in difficult markets.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「make a profit」是固定搭配，意為「賺取利潤」。其他動詞不可與 profit 形成此意。

toeic.question_en: The HR manager will ___ an interview with each candidate next Monday.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「have an interview」為標準搭配，意為「進行面試」。conduct an interview 也常用，但選項中只有 have 適合。

toeic.question_en: We must ___ all client information confidential at all times.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「keep confidential」為固定搭配，意為「保密」。其他動詞不可與 confidential 形成此意。

toeic.question_en: The board has agreed to ___ a long-term strategy for international expansion.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「adopt a strategy」為固定搭配，意為「採用策略」。其他動詞雖文法可，但商業情境中 adopt 最為標準。

toeic.question_en: All staff are required to ___ by the code of conduct of the company.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「abide by」為固定片語，意為「遵守（規則、法律）」。其他動詞不可與 by 形成此搭配。

toeic.question_en: The CEO ___ from her position after the controversy.
toeic.explanation_zh: resign 意為「辭職」；retire 意為「退休」。因醜聞而離職用 resign 較適當。

toeic.question_en: Our department needs to ___ costs without sacrificing quality.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「cut down」意為「削減、減少」。cut off 為「切斷」；其他選項意義不符。

toeic.question_en: The new employee was asked to ___ several responsibilities at once.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「take on」意為「承擔（責任、工作）」。take in 為「理解、收留」；其他意義不符。

toeic.question_en: Sales have been ___ steadily over the past six months.
toeic.explanation_zh: grow 與 increase 均為不及物動詞，可用於描述銷售增長；raise 為及物動詞，須接受詞，此處不適用。

toeic.question_en: The marketing team came up ___ a brilliant new campaign idea.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「come up with」為固定片語，意為「想出、提出」。介系詞必須為 with。

toeic.question_en: The financial report ___ light on the performance issues of the company.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「shed light on」為慣用語，意為「闡明、揭示」。其他動詞不可與 light 形成此意。

toeic.question_en: We should ___ the difference and focus on what we agree on.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「put aside」意為「暫時擱置、放下」。put away 為「收起、儲存」；意義不同。

toeic.question_en: The board meeting was ___ until next Friday due to scheduling conflicts.
toeic.explanation_zh: postpone 意為「延後、推遲」，與 until next Friday 搭配最為合適。cancel 為「取消」。

toeic.question_en: All employees are required to ___ in for work by 9 AM sharp.
toeic.explanation_zh: clock in 和 sign in 均為「上班打卡簽到」的常見用法。check in 多用於旅館或機場。

toeic.question_en: The instructions from the supervisor were ___ enough for everyone to understand.
toeic.explanation_zh: 此處需形容詞修飾主詞 instructions，配合 be 動詞 were。clearly 為副詞，不可用於此處。

toeic.question_en: The negotiation team is ___ the verge of closing the deal.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「on the verge of」為固定片語，意為「瀕臨、即將」。介系詞必須為 on。

toeic.question_en: Our supplier has consistently delivered products of ___ quality.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「high quality」為固定搭配，意為「高品質」。其他形容詞不能與 quality 搭配。

toeic.question_en: The new software is designed to ___ workflow and reduce errors.
toeic.explanation_zh: 此處 to 後須接原形動詞。streamline 意為「簡化、使更有效率」，常用於描述流程改善。

toeic.question_en: The committee will ___ the proposal before the next board meeting.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「look into」意為「調查、研究」。look up 為「查閱」；look after 為「照顧」。

toeic.question_en: The new policy will ___ effect from January 1st next year.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「take effect」為固定搭配，意為「生效」。其他動詞不可與 effect 形成此意。

toeic.question_en: Despite challenges, the company managed to ___ profitable throughout the year.
toeic.explanation_zh: remain 和 stay 均可作連綴動詞，後接形容詞表示「保持某種狀態」。keep 通常需要受詞或反身代名詞。

toeic.question_en: Please ___ a moment to review the terms before signing the contract.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「take a moment」為固定搭配，意為「花一點時間」。其他動詞不可與 moment 形成此意。

toeic.question_en: The company has ___ a partnership with a leading tech firm.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「form a partnership」為標準商業搭配，意為「建立合作關係」。其他動詞不適合。

toeic.question_en: All managers must ___ to the strict ethical standards of the company.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「adhere to」為固定片語，意為「遵守、堅持」。其他動詞不可與 to 形成此搭配。

toeic.question_en: The new project will ___ collaboration between two major departments.
toeic.explanation_zh: involve 意為「需要、牽涉」；此句指項目需要跨部門合作。consist 須與 of 連用。

toeic.question_en: We need to ___ the budget for next quarter as soon as possible.
toeic.explanation_zh: 此處 to 後須接原形動詞。finalize 意為「敲定、定案」。其他選項皆非動詞。

toeic.question_en: The presentation must ___ to the level of expertise of the audience.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「cater to」為固定片語，意為「迎合、滿足（需求）」。其他動詞不可與 to 形成此意。

toeic.question_en: The two products are ___ in terms of features and pricing.
toeic.explanation_zh: 此處 be 動詞後須接形容詞。comparable 意為「可比較的、相當的」。

toeic.question_en: The CEO emphasized the ___ of teamwork in achieving company goals.
toeic.explanation_zh: the 後須接名詞。importance 為名詞「重要性」；important 為形容詞。

toeic.question_en: Our team is ___ capable of handling the new project.
toeic.explanation_zh: 此處需副詞修飾形容詞 capable。fully 為副詞，意為「完全地」。

toeic.question_en: The merger will ___ the market positions of both companies significantly.
toeic.explanation_zh: 此處 will 後須接原形動詞。strengthen 意為「加強、強化」。strong 為形容詞；strength 為名詞。

toeic.question_en: The new policy will be ___ effective immediately.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「put into practice」為固定片語，意為「付諸實行」。介系詞必須為 into。

toeic.question_en: The manager will ___ the performance of each employee during the review.
toeic.explanation_zh: 此處 will 後須接原形動詞。evaluate 意為「評估、評價」。其他選項皆非適當動詞形式。

toeic.question_en: The negotiation broke ___ after both sides refused to compromise.
toeic.explanation_zh: 「break down」意為「破裂、失敗」，常用於談判、關係或機器故障。其他片語意義不符。

toeic.question_en: The quarterly board meeting will be held _____ Friday afternoon in the main conference room.
toeic.explanation_zh: 特定日期（星期幾）使用 on；at 用於時間點，in 用於月份/年份，by 表示截止時間。

toeic.question_en: All expense reports must be submitted _____ the end of the fiscal quarter to avoid processing delays.
toeic.explanation_zh: by 表示在某時間點之前完成（截止），until 強調持續到該時間，on 用於特定日，from 表起點。

toeic.question_en: Our new office is conveniently located _____ the corner of Fifth Avenue and Main Street.
toeic.explanation_zh: at the corner of 是固定搭配，指具體交叉點；on the corner 較少用於此正式語境。

toeic.question_en: The project must be completed _____ two weeks to meet the client's deadline.
toeic.explanation_zh: within 強調「在某段時間範圍內」，比 in 更精準表達期限；by 需搭配明確時間點。

toeic.question_en: Please refer to the attached document _____ the proposed budget changes.
toeic.explanation_zh: regarding 為介系詞，意為「關於」，用法等同 about/concerning。

toeic.question_en: Maintenance work will be carried out _____ the weekend to minimize disruption.
toeic.explanation_zh: throughout 表「整個…期間」，強調貫穿時間段；其他選項語意不符。

toeic.question_en: The contract was signed _____ the CEO and the supplier last Monday.
toeic.explanation_zh: between 用於兩方之間的合約簽訂；by 強調動作執行者，與「雙方」語境不符。

toeic.question_en: Mr. Tanaka has been working _____ this company since 2015.
toeic.explanation_zh: work for + 公司 是固定搭配，表「為某公司工作」；in 後接公司較少見且語意不同。

toeic.question_en: The shipment was delayed _____ unforeseen logistical issues.
toeic.explanation_zh: due to + 名詞表「由於」，因後接名詞片語；because 後須接子句。

toeic.question_en: Please respond to the customer's inquiry _____ 24 hours of receipt.
toeic.explanation_zh: within 24 hours of 是常見搭配，意為「收到後 24 小時內」。

toeic.question_en: Ms. Patel was promoted _____ senior manager last quarter.
toeic.explanation_zh: be promoted to + 職位 為固定搭配，表「晉升為…」。

toeic.question_en: The company specializes _____ providing IT solutions to small businesses.
toeic.explanation_zh: specialize in 為固定動詞片語，意為「專精於」。

toeic.question_en: _____ honest employee is hard to come by these days.
toeic.explanation_zh: honest 開頭發音為母音 /ɒ/，故須用 an；h 不發音。

toeic.question_en: The board appointed Mr. Chen as _____ new CEO of the corporation.
toeic.explanation_zh: 公司只有一位 CEO，為特定且唯一的職位，須用定冠詞 the。

toeic.question_en: _____ punctuality is highly valued in our corporate culture.
toeic.explanation_zh: 抽象不可數名詞（如 punctuality）作通指時不加冠詞。

toeic.question_en: She has been working as _____ accountant at our firm for ten years.
toeic.explanation_zh: accountant 以母音 /æ/ 開頭，且為單數可數職業名詞，用 an。

toeic.question_en: _____ United Kingdom is one of our largest overseas markets.
toeic.explanation_zh: 國名中含 Kingdom/States/Republic 等普通名詞時須加 the。

toeic.question_en: We need _____ qualified translator for the upcoming negotiation in Tokyo.
toeic.explanation_zh: qualified 以子音 /k/ 開頭，且為單數可數，泛指任一合格翻譯，用 a。

toeic.question_en: _____ information you requested has been forwarded to your email.
toeic.explanation_zh: 由 you requested 子句明確指定，故用定冠詞 the；information 為不可數不接 a/an。

toeic.question_en: Our company offers _____ free coffee in the breakroom every day.
toeic.explanation_zh: coffee 在此為不可數名詞作通指，不加冠詞。

toeic.question_en: This year's profit margin is significantly _____ than last year's.
toeic.explanation_zh: 兩者比較使用比較級 higher than。

toeic.question_en: Of all the candidates we interviewed, Ms. Lee was _____ qualified.
toeic.explanation_zh: 三者以上比較且有 of all，用最高級 the most + 形容詞。

toeic.question_en: The new software is far _____ user-friendly than the previous version.
toeic.explanation_zh: user-friendly 為多音節形容詞，比較級用 more；far 為加強語氣修飾比較級。

toeic.question_en: Our Tokyo branch generates _____ revenue of any office in the region.
toeic.explanation_zh: of any office 暗示在某範圍內最高，用最高級 the most。

toeic.question_en: The marketing team's performance this quarter is _____ better than expected.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾比較級 better 用 much/far/even；very 不可修飾比較級。

toeic.question_en: Sales in the second half were not _____ as those in the first half.
toeic.explanation_zh: not as + 原級 + as 表「不如…那麼…」，as strong as 為固定句型。

toeic.question_en: The CFO has _____ experience in financial management among the executives.
toeic.explanation_zh: among the executives 表範圍內比較最高，用最高級 the most。

toeic.question_en: This is by far _____ presentation I have ever attended.
toeic.explanation_zh: by far + the + 最高級 為固定搭配；ever 也提示最高級語境。

toeic.question_en: If the proposal _____ approved, we will begin production next month.
toeic.explanation_zh: 第一條件句：if + 現在簡單式, 主句 will + V，描述可能發生的未來。

toeic.question_en: If I _____ the manager, I would restructure the entire department.
toeic.explanation_zh: 第二條件句（與現在事實相反）：if + were/V-ed, 主句 would + V；正式用法用 were。

toeic.question_en: If the client had signed the contract earlier, we _____ already begun the project.
toeic.explanation_zh: 第三條件句（與過去事實相反）：if + had + p.p., 主句 would have + p.p.。

toeic.question_en: If you _____ ice, it melts.
toeic.explanation_zh: 零條件句（永恆事實）：if + 現在簡單式, 主句也用現在簡單式。

toeic.question_en: Should you _____ any questions, please contact our customer service department.
toeic.explanation_zh: Should 引導的倒裝條件句相當於 if 子句，後接原形動詞 have。

toeic.question_en: Had we anticipated the supply shortage, we _____ ordered additional inventory.
toeic.explanation_zh: Had + 主詞 + p.p. 為第三條件句倒裝，主句用 would have + p.p.。

toeic.question_en: Unless the budget is approved, the project _____ proceed as planned.
toeic.explanation_zh: unless = if not，表第一條件句語意，主句用 will not。

toeic.question_en: All visitors _____ wear identification badges while inside the building.
toeic.explanation_zh: must 表強制性規定（必須），符合公司安全規範語境。

toeic.question_en: You _____ have informed us earlier; we could have rescheduled the meeting.
toeic.explanation_zh: should have + p.p. 表對過去未做之事的責備或遺憾，意為「早該…」。

toeic.question_en: The shipment _____ have arrived by now; let me check the tracking system.
toeic.explanation_zh: should have + p.p. 在此表「按理應該已…」的推測。

toeic.question_en: Employees _____ take vacation days at any time, subject to manager approval.
toeic.explanation_zh: may 表「可以、被允許」，符合「依規定許可」的語意。

toeic.question_en: We _____ have hired more staff; the workload is now overwhelming.
toeic.explanation_zh: should have + p.p. 表「早該…而未做」的後悔。

toeic.question_en: He _____ have left the office already; his car is no longer in the parking lot.
toeic.explanation_zh: must have + p.p. 表對過去事件的肯定推論（一定已經…）。

toeic.question_en: You _____ not smoke anywhere on company premises.
toeic.explanation_zh: must not 表明確禁止；may not 較弱且不適用於明文禁令。

toeic.question_en: The negotiations _____ have failed if both parties had been more flexible.
toeic.explanation_zh: might not have + p.p. 表對過去事件的不確定推論（也許就不會…）。

toeic.question_en: The management decided _____ the company's logo next year.
toeic.explanation_zh: decide 後接不定詞 to + V。

toeic.question_en: We are considering _____ a new branch in Singapore next year.
toeic.explanation_zh: consider 後接動名詞 V-ing。

toeic.question_en: The CEO promised _____ all employees with a year-end bonus.
toeic.explanation_zh: promise 後接不定詞 to + V。

toeic.question_en: The accountant suggested _____ the budget proposal before submission.
toeic.explanation_zh: suggest 後接動名詞 V-ing。

toeic.question_en: Our team is committed to _____ the highest quality service to clients.
toeic.explanation_zh: be committed to 中 to 為介系詞，後接動名詞 V-ing。

toeic.question_en: She managed _____ the project ahead of schedule despite the challenges.
toeic.explanation_zh: manage 後接不定詞 to + V，表「設法做到」。

toeic.question_en: The director recommended _____ external consultants for the merger.
toeic.explanation_zh: recommend 後接動名詞 V-ing。

toeic.question_en: We look forward to _____ from you regarding the contract terms.
toeic.explanation_zh: look forward to 中 to 為介系詞，後接 V-ing。

toeic.question_en: The HR department is responsible for _____ new employees.
toeic.explanation_zh: be responsible for + V-ing 表「負責做某事」。

toeic.question_en: Mr. Wilson refused _____ the unfavorable terms of the contract.
toeic.explanation_zh: refuse 後接不定詞 to + V。

toeic.question_en: _____ in the lobby, the new mural immediately caught visitors' attention.
toeic.explanation_zh: the mural 被陳列，為被動關係，用過去分詞 Displayed 作分詞構句。

toeic.question_en: _____ the report, the analyst noticed several discrepancies in the data.
toeic.explanation_zh: 分析師主動審閱，主動關係用現在分詞 Reviewing。

toeic.question_en: _____ for over a decade, the equipment finally needs to be replaced.
toeic.explanation_zh: 設備「被使用」十幾年，被動關係用過去分詞 Used。

toeic.question_en: _____ his keynote speech, the CEO unveiled the company's new strategy.
toeic.explanation_zh: CEO 主動發表演說，與主句同時發生，用現在分詞 Delivering。

toeic.question_en: _____ from the airport, the delegates went straight to the conference venue.
toeic.explanation_zh: 代表們主動抵達，用現在分詞 Arriving 表「一抵達就…」。

toeic.question_en: _____ the press release, the spokesperson answered questions from reporters.
toeic.explanation_zh: Having issued 表完成式分詞，強調動作先於主句發生。

toeic.question_en: _____ all the relevant data, the team began drafting the proposal.
toeic.explanation_zh: 資料先收集完才開始撰寫提案，用 Having + p.p. 完成式分詞。

toeic.question_en: Not only _____ the deadline, but the team also exceeded the target.
toeic.explanation_zh: Not only 置句首須倒裝：助動詞 did + 主詞 + 原形 V。

toeic.question_en: Hardly _____ the office when the phone started ringing.
toeic.explanation_zh: Hardly...when... 為固定倒裝句型，had + 主詞 + p.p.。

toeic.question_en: No sooner _____ the announcement than the stock price soared.
toeic.explanation_zh: No sooner...than... 句型，前句用過去完成式倒裝 had + 主詞 + p.p.。

toeic.question_en: Under no circumstances _____ confidential client data be shared externally.
toeic.explanation_zh: 否定副詞片語置句首須倒裝：助動詞 should + 主詞 + 原形 V。

toeic.question_en: Seldom _____ such a dramatic increase in quarterly sales.
toeic.explanation_zh: Seldom 為否定副詞置句首，須倒裝：have + 主詞 + p.p.。

toeic.question_en: Only after the audit _____ that several errors had occurred.
toeic.explanation_zh: Only + 副詞片語置句首，主句倒裝：did + 主詞 + 原形 V。

toeic.question_en: Rarely _____ such an enthusiastic response from our customers.
toeic.explanation_zh: Rarely 為否定頻率副詞置句首，須倒裝：do + 主詞 + 原形 V。

toeic.question_en: The negotiation team finally _____ a compromise after hours of discussion.
toeic.explanation_zh: work out 意為「解決、想出（方案）」，符合協商達成妥協語境。

toeic.question_en: Please _____ the meeting until next Tuesday due to the CEO's travel schedule.
toeic.explanation_zh: put off 意為「延後」，符合「會議延期」語境。

toeic.question_en: The auditor will _____ the financial statements next week.
toeic.explanation_zh: look into 意為「調查、審查」，符合稽核語境。

toeic.question_en: Our company has decided to _____ the launch of the new product line.
toeic.explanation_zh: go ahead with 意為「著手進行」，符合決定推出產品的語境。

toeic.question_en: The team needs to _____ a new strategy for entering the Asian market.
toeic.explanation_zh: come up with 意為「想出（點子、方案）」。

toeic.question_en: We must _____ the rising production costs to remain competitive.
toeic.explanation_zh: bring down 意為「降低」，符合「降低成本」語境。

toeic.question_en: The merger will _____ significant changes in the corporate structure.
toeic.explanation_zh: bring about 意為「導致、引起」，符合合併造成改變的語境。

toeic.question_en: Please make sure to _____ the safety protocols before operating the machinery.
toeic.explanation_zh: go over 意為「仔細檢查、複習」，符合操作前複習規範的語境。

toeic.question_en: The applicant managed to _____ to the interviewer with her impressive portfolio.
toeic.explanation_zh: stand out 意為「脫穎而出、引人注目」。

toeic.question_en: Our CEO had to _____ from the negotiations due to personal reasons.
toeic.explanation_zh: pull out 意為「退出」，符合退出協商的語境。

toeic.question_en: It is crucial to _____ a strong relationship with key clients.
toeic.explanation_zh: build a relationship 為固定搭配，意為「建立關係」。

toeic.question_en: The new policy will _____ effect on the first of next month.
toeic.explanation_zh: take effect 為固定搭配，意為「生效」。

toeic.question_en: Our department needs to _____ the project deadline at all costs.
toeic.explanation_zh: meet a deadline 為固定搭配，意為「趕上截止日」。

toeic.question_en: The marketing campaign helped us _____ a profit of over two million dollars.
toeic.explanation_zh: make a profit 為固定搭配，意為「獲利」。

toeic.question_en: The job requires not only technical expertise but also _____ to detail.
toeic.explanation_zh: pay/give attention to detail 為固定搭配，名詞 attention 與前句的 expertise 形成平行的名詞結構。

toeic.question_en: Successful managers are good at delegating, motivating, and _____ their teams.
toeic.explanation_zh: 平行結構：前面三個 V-ing（delegating, motivating），第三個也須為 V-ing developing。

toeic.question_en: The training program is both informative _____ engaging for new hires.
toeic.explanation_zh: both A and B 為固定平行結構搭配。

toeic.question_en: Our priorities are to improve quality, reduce costs, and _____ customer satisfaction.
toeic.explanation_zh: 平行結構：前兩個皆為 to + V（improve, reduce），第三個須與之平行的原形 enhance（共用前面的 to）。

toeic.question_en: The candidate is qualified not only in marketing but also _____ public relations.
toeic.explanation_zh: not only...but also... 後須平行：in marketing 對應 in public relations。

toeic.question_en: She is responsible for hiring new staff, training interns, and _____ performance reviews.
toeic.explanation_zh: 平行結構：前兩個動名詞 hiring, training，第三個須同樣為 V-ing conducting。

toeic.question_en: The presentation was clear, concise, and _____.
toeic.explanation_zh: 平行結構：三個形容詞 clear, concise, informative 排列。

toeic.question_en: Either the CEO _____ the CFO will attend tomorrow's investor briefing.
toeic.explanation_zh: either...or... 為固定平行搭配。

toeic.question_en: The seminar will cover topics such as leadership, communication, and _____.
toeic.explanation_zh: 平行結構：前兩個為名詞 leadership, communication，第三個亦須為名詞 negotiation。

toeic.question_en: The new intern is enthusiastic, hardworking, and _____ to learn.
toeic.explanation_zh: 平行結構：前兩個形容詞 enthusiastic, hardworking，第三個須為形容詞 eager。

toeic.question_en: _____ approved by senior management, the proposal will be implemented immediately.
toeic.explanation_zh: Once 意為「一旦」，接過去分詞構成簡略子句，符合語意。

toeic.question_en: Our quarterly revenue has grown _____ steadily over the past three years.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾副詞 steadily 的比較級用 more steadily；其他選項不能與 steadily 構成自然比較語意。

toeic.question_en: The conference room is reserved _____ Mr. Lin from 2 to 4 p.m.
toeic.explanation_zh: reserved for + 人/單位 表「為某人保留」。

toeic.question_en: Should the shipment fail to arrive on time, please _____ us immediately.
toeic.explanation_zh: Should 倒裝條件句後的主句為祈使句，用原形動詞 notify。

toeic.question_en: The training session lasted _____ three hours due to the extensive Q&A.
toeic.explanation_zh: over 在此意為「超過、多於」，常用於時間或數量。

toeic.question_en: Despite _____ exhausted, the project manager continued working into the night.
toeic.explanation_zh: Despite 為介系詞後接動名詞或名詞片語，being exhausted 為動名詞被動語意。

toeic.question_en: The CEO insisted _____ a full investigation into the data breach.
toeic.explanation_zh: insist on + 名詞/動名詞 為固定搭配，意為「堅持」。

toeic.question_en: Had the manager been informed earlier, she _____ taken appropriate action.
toeic.explanation_zh: 第三條件句倒裝（Had + 主詞 + p.p.），主句用 would have + p.p.。

toeic.question_en: Of the three proposed locations, the downtown office is _____ most accessible by public transit.
toeic.explanation_zh: 形容詞最高級前須加定冠詞 the。

toeic.question_en: Each of the regional managers _____ required to submit a quarterly report to headquarters.
toeic.explanation_zh: 主謂一致：each of + 複數名詞，動詞用單數 is。

toeic.question_en: The number of complaints received this quarter _____ significantly lower than last year.
toeic.explanation_zh: the number of 視為單數主詞，動詞用 is。

toeic.question_en: Neither the CEO nor the board members _____ aware of the merger proposal at that time.
toeic.explanation_zh: neither A nor B 句型動詞與最接近的主詞 B（複數）一致，用 were。

toeic.question_en: A number of employees _____ expressed concerns about the new attendance policy.
toeic.explanation_zh: a number of + 複數名詞，動詞用複數 have。

toeic.question_en: Every applicant for the marketing position _____ to take an online aptitude test.
toeic.explanation_zh: every + 單數名詞，動詞用第三人稱單數 needs。

toeic.question_en: The new accounting software has greatly improved the _____ of our monthly reports.
toeic.explanation_zh: 介系詞 of 後接名詞，accuracy 為名詞。

toeic.question_en: Our customer service team responds to inquiries _____ and professionally.
toeic.explanation_zh: 副詞修飾動詞 responds，且與 professionally 平行，用 promptly。

toeic.question_en: The board members were _____ impressed by the candidate's detailed presentation.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾形容詞 impressed 需用副詞 thoroughly。

toeic.question_en: The sales department has launched several _____ campaigns this quarter.
toeic.explanation_zh: 修飾名詞 campaigns 需用形容詞 innovative。

toeic.question_en: The marketing team conducted a thorough _____ of consumer preferences before the product launch.
toeic.explanation_zh: 冠詞 a 與形容詞 thorough 後接名詞 analysis。

toeic.question_en: Our flights were delayed for hours; _____, the conference had already begun by the time we arrived.
toeic.explanation_zh: 表結果用轉折副詞 consequently（因此）。

toeic.question_en: The proposal was well-researched; _____, the committee rejected it due to budget constraints.
toeic.explanation_zh: 前後句轉折用 however（然而）。

toeic.question_en: The factory exceeded its production targets; _____, employee morale has improved significantly.
toeic.explanation_zh: 表進一步補充用 moreover（此外）。

toeic.question_en: The proposal was rejected twice; _____, the team continued refining their idea.
toeic.explanation_zh: 表讓步轉折用 nevertheless（儘管如此）。

toeic.question_en: Sales have been slow this quarter; _____, management has decided to reduce the marketing budget.
toeic.explanation_zh: 表結果用 therefore（因此）。

toeic.question_en: _____ of the participants at the seminar received a complimentary tote bag and notebook.
toeic.explanation_zh: most of + the/限定詞 + 複數名詞，表示「大多數的」。

toeic.question_en: There is very _____ time left before the deadline, so we must act quickly.
toeic.explanation_zh: time 為不可數名詞，「很少」用 little。

toeic.question_en: Only _____ employees attended the optional training session held on Saturday.
toeic.explanation_zh: 可數名詞 employees「少數幾個」用 a few。

toeic.question_en: The manager noted that there were too _____ qualified applicants for the senior role.
toeic.explanation_zh: 可數名詞 applicants「太少」用 few。

toeic.question_en: We didn't receive _____ feedback from the focus group on the new packaging design.
toeic.explanation_zh: feedback 為不可數名詞，用 much。

toeic.question_en: _____ of the two final candidates demonstrated strong leadership skills during the interview.
toeic.explanation_zh: 指兩者皆是用 both of。

toeic.question_en: _____ of the proposals submitted this week meets our minimum technical requirements.
toeic.explanation_zh: Neither of + 複數名詞 + 單數動詞 meets，表示「兩者都不」。

toeic.question_en: You can choose _____ the Tuesday or the Thursday slot for the orientation session.
toeic.explanation_zh: either A or B，表示二擇一。

toeic.question_en: _____ employee in the department must complete the compliance training by Friday.
toeic.explanation_zh: each + 單數名詞 employee，表示「每一位」。

toeic.question_en: _____ of the warehouse staff is permitted to enter the secure storage area without authorization.
toeic.explanation_zh: None of + 名詞，表示「沒有任何人」。

toeic.question_en: If _____ has any objections to the new policy, please speak up before the meeting ends.
toeic.explanation_zh: 疑問/條件句中用 anyone（任何人）。

toeic.question_en: _____ in the office was surprised when the CEO announced his early retirement.
toeic.explanation_zh: 肯定句表示「每個人」用 everyone。

toeic.question_en: _____ left a confidential file on the conference room table after the meeting.
toeic.explanation_zh: 肯定句表示「某人」用 someone。

toeic.question_en: _____ was willing to volunteer for the weekend inventory audit, so the manager assigned it himself.
toeic.explanation_zh: 表示「沒有人」用 no one。

toeic.question_en: Please let me know if _____ from the IT department contacts you about the software update.
toeic.explanation_zh: if 條件句中表示「任何人」用 anyone。

toeic.question_en: The supervisor had the new intern _____ all the client files before the audit.
toeic.explanation_zh: 使役動詞 have + 受詞 + 原形動詞（主動關係）。

toeic.question_en: The CEO made every department head _____ a detailed budget proposal by Friday.
toeic.explanation_zh: 使役動詞 make + 受詞 + 原形動詞。

toeic.question_en: The manager let her assistant _____ the meeting agenda independently this time.
toeic.explanation_zh: 使役動詞 let + 受詞 + 原形動詞。

toeic.question_en: Our colleagues helped us _____ the entire booth before the trade show opened.
toeic.explanation_zh: help + 受詞 + (to) 原形動詞；此處用 set up。

toeic.question_en: The trainer had the participants _____ in pairs to complete the role-play exercise.
toeic.explanation_zh: have + 人 + 原形動詞，表使役。

toeic.question_en: We need to have the projector _____ before tomorrow morning's investor presentation.
toeic.explanation_zh: have + 物 + 過去分詞，表「使某物被…」。

toeic.question_en: Ms. Lin got her business cards _____ in both English and Japanese for the trade show.
toeic.explanation_zh: get + 物 + 過去分詞，表被動使役。

toeic.question_en: The company has its financial statements _____ by an external auditor every year.
toeic.explanation_zh: have + 物 + 過去分詞，被動使役結構。

toeic.question_en: I'd like to get the broken office chairs _____ as soon as possible.
toeic.explanation_zh: get + 物 + 過去分詞，使物品被替換。

toeic.question_en: We had the conference room _____ to accommodate up to fifty attendees.
toeic.explanation_zh: have + 物 + 過去分詞，表使動關係。

toeic.question_en: _____ the new policy will improve productivity remains to be seen.
toeic.explanation_zh: 名詞子句作主詞表「是否」用 whether，不可用 if。

toeic.question_en: The committee will decide _____ the proposal should be implemented next month.
toeic.explanation_zh: 名詞子句作受詞表「是否」，whether 較正式。

toeic.question_en: _____ surprised everyone was that the merger was announced without prior notice.
toeic.explanation_zh: what 引導名詞子句作主詞，包含「使…的事物」。

toeic.question_en: The CFO explained _____ the budget cuts were necessary in the current economic climate.
toeic.explanation_zh: why 引導名詞子句作 explain 的受詞，表原因。

toeic.question_en: Please confirm _____ you will be able to attend the strategy meeting next Tuesday.
toeic.explanation_zh: confirm 後表「是否」的名詞子句用 whether。

toeic.question_en: It was Ms. Chen _____ negotiated the contract with the overseas supplier.
toeic.explanation_zh: 強調句 it was + 人 + who，強調主詞。
